channel.title: New Lucky Pharma Products
channel.description: Google Merchant Feed for New Lucky Pharma - Quality healthcare and medicine products.

item.title: CETIRIZ TABLET
item.description: Cetiriz (Cetirizine) tablets offer rapid, non-sedating multi-symptom relief from cold allergy symptoms including sneezing, runny or itchy nose, watery eyes, and allergic skin hives. It helps block histamine release for clean, continuous 24-hour immunity.

item.title: CETIRIZ SYRUP
item.description: Cetiriz syrup provides smooth, fast-acting liquid relief from allergy and seasonal cold symptoms in children and adults. Effective against persistent sneezing, hay fever, running nose, and itchy skin rashes with an easy-to-measure dosage.

item.title: DIGENE GEL
item.description: Digene gel mixed-fruit flavored liquid offers high-speed relief from stomach acidity, painful gas, sour belching, bloating, and burning heartburn. Its active double-action formula actively neutralizes stomach acids and coats hot mucosal lining instantly.

item.title: DIGENE TABLETS
item.description: Digene chewable anti-gas tablets support handy, on-the-go relief from acidity, severe indigestion, and heartburn. Simply chew down on demand to rapidly diminish flatulence and settle acid discomfort.

item.title: ENO REGULAR
item.description: Eno Regular is a fast-acting effervescent powder that neutralizes stomach acid in 6 seconds. It acts as an instant relief remedy for heartburn, acid indigestion, physical bloating, and gastric pressure.

item.title: AMOXICILLIN
item.description: Amoxicillin is a highly reliable broad-spectrum penicillin antibiotic widely used to eliminate deep bacterial infections in ears, sinuses, throat, soft skin tissue, urinary tracts, and lungs. *Strictly sold on valid medical prescription.*

item.title: NORFLOX-TZ
item.description: Norflox-TZ is a powerful, synergized anti-infective treatment specifically prescribed to combat acute bacterial diarrhea, amoebic dysentery, gastrointestinal infections, and painful pelvic bowel cramps.

item.title: ZENFLOX - OZ
item.description: Zenflox-OZ is an advanced combination antibiotic used for treating severe gut infections, bacterial and parasitical diarrhea, and multi-bacterial dysentery. It stops micro-organism replication effectively.

item.title: SOFRAMYCIN
item.description: Soframycin Skin Cream contains a highly effective bactericidal agent formulated for prompt application over skin abrasions, minor cuts, shallow burns, scalded tissue, and infected root margins.

item.title: DETTOL LIQUID
item.description: Dettol Antiseptic Disinfectant Liquid is an essential first aid and home hygiene liquid. Highly effective in cleaning cuts, surface scrapes, and minor wounds, killing germs on contact to prevent infection.

item.title: SAVLON LIQUID
item.description: Savlon Antiseptic Liquid delivers gentle, stinging-free healing protection against bacteria and viral agents. Highly prized for first-aid cleaning, home floor washing, and treating minor scratches seamlessly.

item.title: BETADINE OINTMENT
item.description: Betadine Antiseptic Ointment is a gold-standard local antiseptic. Slowly releases active iodine to eradicate bacteria, fungi, and virus elements on minor wounds, burns, and post-surgery stitches.

item.title: LIV. 52
item.description: Himalaya Liv.52 is a world-renowned Ayurvedic liver supplement. It protects hepatic tissue from toxic overload, stimulates healthy cellular regeneration, drives protein synthesis, and improves appetite and digestion.

item.title: LIV.52 DS
item.description: Liv.52 DS (Double Strength) provides highly concentrated Ayurvedic support for critical liver recovery, severe fatty liver, alcohol damage, jaundice recovery, and systemic protein absorption.

item.title: JOHNSON'S BABY CARE KIT
item.description: A beautifully packaged gift kit comprising ultra-mild, clinically tested baby essentials. Perfect for daily grooming, bathing, and moisturizing young, sensitive skins.

item.title: BABY FEEDING BOTTLE
item.description: High-grade, BPA-free baby feeding bottle designed to mimic natural breastfeeding. Equipped with an anti-colic silicone teat to minimize gaseous air intake during active feeding.

item.title: CERELAC
item.description: Nestle Cerelac is a premium, iron-rich complementary infant food. Fortified with essential vitamins, minerals, and DHA to support healthy physical growth and early brain development recursively.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Baby & Toddler Food

item.title: LACTOGEN
item.description: Nestle Lactogen is a spray dried baby formula with probiotic (L. reuteri) to keep a healthy gut. Crafted to support overall mental development, bones, and body growth.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Baby & Toddler Food

item.title: AMULSPRAY
item.description: Amulspray is an immensely popular spray-dried infant milk food of supreme quality. Enriched to support healthy rapid bone consolidation, weight regulation, and physical cellular division.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Baby & Toddler Food

item.title: DEXOLAC
item.description: Dexolac is a premium nutritional formula specially structured to meet the high nutrient demands of infants, assisting tissue building, metabolic integrity, and immune growth.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Baby & Toddler Food

item.title: BENADRYL SYRUPS
item.description: Benadryl Cough Syrup provides rapid, effective relief from irritating dry coughs, throat scratchiness, and chest tightness. It calms the coughing reflex while relaxing chest congestion.

item.title: VICKS VAPORUB
item.description: Vicks VapoRub is an iconic topical ointment providing soothing vapor therapy for blocked nose, sinus congestion, chest tightness, and cold-related body aches.

item.title: VICKS INHALER
item.description: Vicks Inhaler is a portable, handy keychain stick providing rapid clearing relief from sinus pressure and nasal stuffiness in seconds. Slipped nicely in pockets.

item.title: PUDIN HARA
item.description: Dabur Pudin Hara is an effective, natural Ayurvedic solution formulated to cure painful gas, burning indigestion, belching, and stomach spasms. Fast stomach relief encapsulating pure mint extracts.

item.title: FIRST AID KITS
item.description: A complete, durable workspace and home First Aid Kit packed to cure sudden minor cuts, scratches, skin burns, insect bites, sprains, or trauma immediately.

item.title: HANSAPLAST REGULAR
item.description: Hansaplast adhesive plasters offer reliable local wound coverage and physical compression. Keeps dust, dirt, and water microbes out of healing cracks with durable adhesive seal.

item.title: BELLADONNA SBL
item.description: SBL Belladonna Dilution is a top-quality homeopathic remedy sourced with maximum purity. Famously recommended to treat sudden throbbing headaches, high fever, sore throbbing throat, and neuralgias.

item.title: ORS (ELECTRAL)
item.description: WHO-approved Oral Rehydration Salts (ORS) formulation designed to quickly treat systemic dehydration caused by summer heatwaves, acute diarrhea, vomiting, fever, or workout exhaustion.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition

item.title: GLUCON-D
item.description: Glucon-D is a fast-dissolving nutritional energy powder. Provides an instantaneous gush of glucose sugar to muscles and brain cells to combat exhaustion during hot summer days.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition

item.title: GLUCOSE - D
item.description: Glucose-D powder is an affordable calcium and Vitamin D enriched quick energy supplement. Strengthens bone densities while curing immediate fatigue from heavy work.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition

item.title: ORS POWDER
item.description: Hydrating ORS powder returns essential fluid levels and restores depleted electrolytes in infants and adults facing dehydration, sickness, or severe heat waves.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition

item.title: CLINICL THERMOMETER
item.description: High-precision medical clinical thermometer designed to monitor human core body temperature. Delivers fast oral, rectal, or underarm readings safely and accurately.

item.title: INJECTINS & SYRINGES
item.description: Premium quality, sterile disposable medical syringes featuring sharp lubricated needles. Intended for accurate administering of prescription fluids and clinical diagnostics.

item.title: SURGICAL COTTON ROLL
item.description: High Absorption Surgical Grade Cotton Roll. Made of 100% natural pure fibers bleached to standard hospital specifications, perfect for cleansing cuts and padding fresh dressing wounds.

item.title: NEEDLE
item.description: Sterilized medical needles designed with tri-bevel tips to ensure smooth clinical penetration and minimal tissue discomfort during blood withdrawal or fluid administration.

item.title: IV SET
item.description: Sterile Intravenous (IV) Infusion Set with precise flow regulator, bubble-free drip chamber, and sharp spike designed to feed saline or glucose medicines directly to patient veins.

item.title: SURGICAL ADHESIVE
item.description: High quality microporous medical surgical tape designed to wrap and anchor thick cotton gauges, bandages, and tubes tightly onto sweaty skin surfaces without causing allergic irritation on removal.

item.title: CREPE BANDAGE
item.description: Surgical Crepe Bandage provides uniform physical pressure and durable support for muscular strains, painful sprains, joint dislocations, and chronic varicose swelling.

item.title: HORLICKS
item.description: Horlicks Malty Nourishment Drink supports holistic mental and skeletal growth in children. Rich in 23 crucial growth nutrients, making young minds sharper and bones stronger.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition

item.title: MOTHER HORLICKS
item.description: Mother's Horlicks is a scientifically compiled nutritional beverage for pregnant and breastfeeding women. Rich in DHA and critical micronutrients supporting a healthy delivery and infant brain growth.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition

item.title: COMPLAN
item.description: Complan health powder features 100% milk protein to stimulate growth. Packed with 34 vital vital ingredients, clinically proven to make kids grow double as fast.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition

item.title: BOURNVITA
item.description: Cadbury Bournvita is a delectable malted growth powder featuring rich chocolate taste. Power-packed with active formula nutrients supporting physical strength and mental sharpness.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition

item.title: PROTINEX
item.description: Protinex is a premium high-protein supplement designed to boost muscles, vitality, and immunity. Refined with essential vitamins to supplement modern vegetarian lifestyles.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition

item.title: SENSODYNE
item.description: Sensodyne Toothpaste is clinically proven to protect sensitive teeth, creating a mineral barrier over exposed dentin to stop painful tingling from cold and hot beverages.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Oral Care

item.title: PARACETAMOL
item.description: Paracetamol IP is the trusted household first-aid standard for fast relief of body fever, mild viral headaches, toothache, muscular cramps, and local physical soreness.

item.title: VOLINI GEL
item.description: Volini topical pain relief gel delivers quick pain reduction in stiff shoulders, elbow sprains, leg joints, lower back sprains, and knee tendon inflammation.

item.title: VOLINI SPRAY
item.description: Volini Instant Spray is a convenient aerosol spray that targets musculoskeletal pain and muscle sprains with deep, freezing menthol cooling therapy in seconds. Perfect for sports fields.

item.title: ZANDU BALM
item.description: Zandu Balm is India's legendary Ayurvedic remedy for headache, sinus congestion, neck pain, and muscle fatigue. It offers deep soothing warmth inside every jar.

item.title: CROCIN ADVANCE
item.description: Crocin Advance features an advanced fast-release formula containing Paracetamol. Sinks into stomach blood streams rapidly and gets to work twice as fast as standard paracetamol.

item.title: DETTOL SOAP
item.description: Dettol Hygiene Soap keeps skin smelling fresh and actively fights off disease-carrying bacteria, surrounding you in a protective defensive layer.

item.title: STAYFREE
item.description: Stayfree Secure Sanitary napkins are built with highly comforting dry covers and leak-lock absorption to offer leak-free menstrual hygiene and all-day protection.

item.title: DERMOCOOL POWDER
item.description: Dermicool Menthol Powder provides double action relief during hot summers, treating sweat irritation and prickly heat spots with an instant freezing chill.

item.title: BOROLINE
item.description: Boroline Antiseptic Boric Cream is an Ayurvedic legacy ointment. Formulated with rich lanolin to heal bleeding lips, cracked winter heels, and surgical cuts.

item.title: BOROPLUS
item.description: BoroPlus Antiseptic Cream is enriched with 10 powerful natural herbs, shielding healthy skin cells from cold dehydration and repairing minor scratches.

item.title: MULTIVITAMINS
item.description: Advanced multivitamin daily health tablets blended to restore missing nutrients. Boosts daily energy levels and raises general immunity levels.

item.title: HONEY
item.description: 100% Pure, raw honey. Rich in healing enzymes, anti-oxidants, and natural organic sugars. Excellent as an immunity building agent and sore throat remedy.

item.title: REVITAL H
item.description: Revital H is a daily nutraceutical energy supplement. Combined with modern active Ginseng, Vitamins, and minerals to cure fatigue and build daily core stamina.

item.title: OSTOCALCIUM
item.description: Ostocalcium chewable tablets supply robust Calcium and Vitamin D3 directly to your bones. Supports strong bone density, skeletal build, and youthful teeth.

item.title: DABUR CHYAWANPRASH
item.description: Dabur Chyawanprash is India's favorite immunity building health pulp. Formulated based on thousands of years of Ayurvedic research to double immune strengths and fight cold viruses.
